title: koeleria fominii
intro: Koeleria fominii is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as Koeleria or June grass, native to China and Mongolia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. Koeleria fominii has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Koeleria fominii is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
